name: mesh-playwright-stats
description: Playwright tool to collect MESH subject stats and group by students

scripts.parse: node -e "console.warn('parse is legacy for XLSX only; use npm run download for API mode')" && node tools/parse-reports.js
scripts.check: node --check web-service.js && node --check tools/mesh-api.js && node --check tools/download-reports.js && node --check tools/parse-reports.js && node --check tools/trace-api.js
